allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Content scripts\\fetchMarketData.js -Raw | Select-String -Pattern ".{60,70}" -AllMatches\).Matches | Where-Object { $_.Index -lt 500 } | Select-Object -First 5 Value)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("scripts\\fetchMarketData.js"\); $pos = 0; $lineNum = 1; while \($pos -lt $bytes.Length -and $lineNum -lt 19\) { if \($bytes[$pos] -eq 10\) { $lineNum++ }; $pos++ }; $lineStart = $pos; $lineEnd = $pos; while \($lineEnd -lt $bytes.Length -and $bytes[$lineEnd] -ne 10\) { $lineEnd++ }; $lineBytes = $bytes[$lineStart..\($lineEnd-1\)]; Write-Host "Length: $\($lineBytes.Length\)"; Write-Host "Col63 byte: $\($lineBytes[62]\)"; $lineBytes[58..67] | ForEach-Object { "{0:X2}" -f $_ } | Join-String -Separator " ")

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("scripts\\fetchMarketData.js"\); $pos = 0; $lineNum = 1; while \($pos -lt $bytes.Length -and $lineNum -lt 19\) { if \($bytes[$pos] -eq 10\) { $lineNum++ }; $pos++ }; $lineStart = $pos; $lineEnd = $pos; while \($lineEnd -lt $bytes.Length -and $bytes[$lineEnd] -ne 10\) { $lineEnd++ }; $lineBytes = $bytes[$lineStart..\($lineEnd-1\)]; Write-Host "Line19 length: $\($lineBytes.Length\)"; Write-Host "Bytes 58-67: $\(\($lineBytes[58..67] | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' '\)")
